history: 2026-06-23: Mini-program selected-tenant check-in verified locally in real Chrome and pushed at d52c4c5. Closed tenantId bypass by requiring createMobileCheckIn requests with tenantId to resolve through a valid enabled mini-program appId; unknown appId + tenantId now returns MINI_PROGRAM_NOT_FOUND, tenant-owned appId mismatches return MINI_PROGRAM_TENANT_MISMATCH, and default appId + selected tenant writes to the selected active tenant/personnel. Browser smoke asserts two tenants with the same phone: conflict returns MULTIPLE_TENANTS with no writes, invalid appId + tenantId is rejected, selected tenantB via default app writes one photo-backed check-in only for tenantB, and tenant-owned appId still writes only to tenantA on a separate date.
